steps.title: Set up the percent increase equation
steps.content:
A 37.5% increase means the final value equals the original value times 1.375. If $x$ is the number on July 1:
$$264 = 1.375x$$

steps.title: Backsolve to find the initial value
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice B (165):
$$1.375 \times 165 = 226.875 \neq 264$$
Fails. Testing choice A (192):
$$1.375 \times 192 = 192 + 72 = 264$$
That confirms A is correct.
